trigger_prototypes.name: {HOSTNAME} Sentinel ERROR! Investigate on the router

trigger_prototypes.expression: find(/ZENTRO_ZBX_TEMPLATE_MIKROTIK_ROUTER/Alias[{#SNMPVALUE}],,"like","100m")=0 and find(/ZENTRO_ZBX_TEMPLATE_MIKROTIK_ROUTER/Alias[{#SNMPVALUE}],,"like","mgmt")=0 and find(/ZENTRO_ZBX_TEMPLATE_MIKROTIK_ROUTER/Alias[{#SNMPVALUE}],,"like","BBU")=0 and find(/ZENTRO_ZBX_TEMPLATE_MIKROTIK_ROUTER/Alias[{#SNMPVALUE}],,"like","UPS")=0 and  find(/ZENTRO_ZBX_TEMPLATE_MIKROTIK_ROUTER/Alias[{#SNMPVALUE}],,"like","APC")=0 and  find(/ZENTRO_ZBX_TEMPLATE_MIKROTIK_ROUTER/Name[{#SNMPVALUE}],,"like","100m")=0 and find(/ZENTRO_ZBX_TEMPLATE_MIKROTIK_ROUTER/Name[{#SNMPVALUE}],,"like","mgmt")=0 and last(/ZENTRO_ZBX_TEMPLATE_MIKROTIK_ROUTER/Speed[{#SNMPVALUE}],#3)<1000000000 and last(/ZENTRO_ZBX_TEMPLATE_MIKROTIK_ROUTER/Speed[{#SNMPVALUE}],#3)<>0
trigger_prototypes.name: {HOSTNAME} int {#SNMPVALUE} ({#IFALIAS}) not gig
